testcase.name: Storybook Stories - Rendering & Console › should load Storybook dashboard
Storybook Stories - Rendering & Console › should render story without console errors
Storybook Stories - Rendering & Console › should display story canvas
Storybook Stories - Rendering & Console › should load story panel without errors
Storybook Stories - Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › should pass axe accessibility checks on story
Storybook Stories - Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › should have semantic heading structure
Storybook Stories - Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › should have proper color contrast
Storybook Stories - Keyboard Accessibility › should be keyboard navigable
Storybook Stories - Keyboard Accessibility › should support Enter key on interactive elements
Storybook Stories - Keyboard Accessibility › should have visible focus indicators
Storybook Stories - Props & Controls › should display story controls panel
Storybook Stories - Props & Controls › should update story when controls change
Storybook Stories - Component Coverage › should have PublicEmptyStateComponent story
Storybook Stories - Component Coverage › should have PublicFormSectionComponent story
Storybook Stories - Component Coverage › should have PublicPageHeaderComponent story
Storybook Stories - Component Coverage › should have PublicStatusCardComponent story
Storybook Stories - Component Coverage › should have at least 4 component stories
Storybook Stories - Performance › should load Storybook within 5 seconds
Storybook Stories - Performance › should render story within 3 seconds
Storybook Stories - Error Handling › should handle missing story gracefully
Storybook Stories - Error Handling › should recover from story error
Shell Module Federation › should load shell application
Shell Module Federation › should render shell navigation
Shell Module Federation › should expose remotes in window object
Shell Module Federation › should have shared dependencies available
Shell Module Federation › should allow navigation to services remote
Shell Module Federation › should allow navigation to reporting remote
Shell Module Federation › should allow navigation to admin remote
Shell Module Federation › should allow navigation to QA remote
Shell Module Federation › should preserve routing when navigating between remotes
Shell Module Federation › should maintain shared tokens across remotes
Shell Module Federation › should load CSS variables from design system
Shell Module Federation › should not have console errors on load
Shell Module Federation › should handle remote load failure gracefully
Shell Module Federation › should initialize module federation manifest
Shell Module Federation › should share PrimeNG across remotes
Shell Module Federation › should share Angular packages across remotes
Remote Loading Performance › should load services remote within acceptable time
Remote Loading Performance › should load reporting remote within acceptable time
Remote Loading Performance › should load admin remote within acceptable time
Remote Loading Performance › should load QA remote within acceptable time
Token Inheritance › should inherit color tokens in shell and remotes
Token Inheritance › should apply consistent font across federation boundary
Documentation Code Examples › Federation Config Example - shell federation.config.ts

Documentation Code Examples › Testing Pattern Example - DOM Query
Documentation Link Validation › should have valid references to component files
Documentation Link Validation › should have valid references to test files
Documentation Link Validation › should have valid references to documentation files
